# ZyrithTech (Zyrith Technologies Pvt. Ltd.)

> Digital growth partner for startups, SMBs, and professional service firms. ZyrithTech brings strategy, design, development, and marketing under one accountable team — building websites, brand systems, and SEO-driven marketing that turn a company's digital presence into a consistent inquiry pipeline. Based in Ghaziabad, India, and serving clients across India, the United States, the United Kingdom, Australia, and the Middle East.

## Services

- [Digital Marketing](https://zyrithtech.com/services/digital-marketing): SEO, content, social media, PPC, email, and analytics that build a qualified lead pipeline.
  - [SEO Services](https://zyrithtech.com/services/digital-marketing/search-engine-optimization-seo): Technical, on-page, and local SEO built around buyer intent.
  - [Social Media Marketing](https://zyrithtech.com/services/digital-marketing/social-media-marketing)
  - [PPC Advertising](https://zyrithtech.com/services/digital-marketing/ppc-advertising)
  - [Email Marketing](https://zyrithtech.com/services/digital-marketing/email-marketing)
  - [Content Marketing](https://zyrithtech.com/services/digital-marketing/content-marketing)
  - [Analytics & Performance Reporting](https://zyrithtech.com/services/digital-marketing/analytics-and-performance-reporting)
- [Web Development](https://zyrithtech.com/services/web-development): Platform-agnostic websites and e-commerce on Astro, Webflow, Wix Studio, WordPress, or Shopify.
  - [Website Design & Development](https://zyrithtech.com/services/web-development/website-design-and-development)
  - [E-commerce Solutions](https://zyrithtech.com/services/web-development/e-commerce-solutions)
  - [Website Hosting & Maintenance](https://zyrithtech.com/services/web-development/website-hosting-and-maintenance)
- [Creative & Branding](https://zyrithtech.com/services/creative-branding): Brand identity, logo design, visual systems, and UI/UX.
  - [Graphic & Visual Design](https://zyrithtech.com/services/creative-branding/graphic-visual-design)
  - [Logo & Brand Identity](https://zyrithtech.com/services/creative-branding/logo-and-brand-identity)

## Positioning

- One accountable partner across strategy, design, development, and marketing — not five disconnected vendors.
- Strategy-first and platform-agnostic; recommendations are based on the client's business, not agency lock-in.
- Reporting is tied to business outcomes (traffic and leads), not vanity metrics.
